_note: Clean bug from a failing Gherkin scenario. All context is in domain language — no vocabulary cleanup needed. Tests that step 6 produces a fully-structured bug report with all required sections.

task.title: Task: Send settlement confirmation email
task.body:
## Gherkin

```gherkin
Feature: Settlement confirmation email

  Scenario: Merchant receives confirmation email after settlement is processed
    Given a Settlement with status 'pending'
    When the Settlement is marked as 'processed'
    Then the Merchant receives a confirmation email
    And the NotificationQueued event is emitted

  Scenario: No email sent when settlement is cancelled
    Given a Settlement with status 'pending'
    When the Settlement is cancelled
    Then no email is sent to the Merchant
```

## Contracts

### NotificationQueued
Emitted when a notification is queued for delivery.
```json
{
  "event": "NotificationQueued",
  "settlementId": "<uuid>",
  "recipientMerchantId": "<uuid>",
  "notificationType": "settlement_confirmation",
  "queuedAt": "<iso8601>"
}
```

## Impacted Areas
- `src/settlements/notifications/`
- `src/events/`

bug_context.one_sentence_description: After a Settlement is marked as processed, no confirmation email is sent to the Merchant.
bug_context.failing_scenario: Merchant receives confirmation email after settlement is processed
bug_context.observed_behavior: No confirmation email was delivered to the Merchant after the Settlement was marked as processed. The NotificationQueued event was not emitted.
bug_context.expected_behavior: The Merchant receives a confirmation email and the NotificationQueued event is emitted when the Settlement transitions to processed.
reproduction_steps: Create a Settlement and set its status to 'pending'.
Mark the Settlement as 'processed' via the Settlement management interface.
Observe the email queue — no confirmation email appears for the Merchant.
bug_context.regression_risk: Other notification types (e.g. cancellation notices) may share the same dispatch path and could also be silently failing.
